# Elion Car Care

> Mobile hand car detailing in Ann Arbor, Michigan. Ellis, an 18-year-old local detailer based in Burns Park, comes to your driveway and washes your car by hand. Summer-seasonal and by appointment. No storefront, no drop-off, no automated brushes.

## Contact and identity
- Business: Elion Car Care
- Owner and detailer: Ellis, 18, based in Burns Park, Ann Arbor
- Phone (text or call): (628) 252-0740
- Email: info@elioncarcare.com
- City: Ann Arbor, Michigan, US. Service-area business, no public street address.

## Service area
Burns Park, Ann Arbor gets free travel and the fastest scheduling. Greater Ann Arbor (ZIP codes 48104, 48103, 48105) adds $5 travel. Anywhere else in the Ann Arbor area, just ask. US only.

## Packages
- Basic $40 (about 45 minutes): a real two-bucket hand wash. Wheel and tire rinse, foam pre-wash to lift grit, Mr. Pink two-bucket contact wash, full body rinse, hand dry with no water spots.
- Essential $60 (about 1 hour): everything in Basic, plus a wax protectant for gloss and a few weeks of protection, and tire shine.
- Premium from $200 (about 4 hours, quoted on your car): everything in Essential, plus clay bar decontamination, single-stage machine polish, ceramic protection on the paint in place of wax, ceramic protection on the wheels, and Diablo wheel cleaner and tire shine. All included.

## Add-ons
- Interior: $40 on Basic, or $35 with Essential or Premium. Vacuum, full wipe-down, glass, door jambs, and vents. A standard interior clean.
- Steam clean $20 (needs Interior): lifts set-in grime and sanitizes vents, seams, and the spots a wipe-down misses.
- Deep clean (quoted): for set-in stains, spills, heavy pet hair, or a long-neglected cabin. Ellis quotes it once he sees the car.
- Diablo wheel cleaner $10 (included on Premium): breaks down brake dust baked onto the wheels, past what a rinse can lift.
- Clay bar $20 (included on Premium): pulls embedded grit so the paint feels glass-smooth. The right prep before wax or ceramic.
- Trim and plastic shine: $30 with Essential, $25 with Premium. Chemical Guys VRP on faded trim, exterior. Inside and out is $50.
- Ceramic on wheels $20 (included on Premium): a ceramic sealant so brake dust and road grime wipe right off.
- Headlight restoration $30: sand, polish, and a UV seal to bring foggy, yellowed headlights back to clear.

## Offers
- 25% off your first wash. Ellis takes it off your total after the job. Nothing to enter.
- Tell a neighbor: send a neighbor to Elion Car Care, and when they book, you both get $10 off your next wash.

## Payment
Venmo @Ellis-Wyatt-2 or cash, paid after the job once you are happy with the car. No deposit, no card on file.

## How to book
Text or call (628) 252-0740, email info@elioncarcare.com, or book online at https://elioncarcare.com/book

## Honest notes
New business, no customer reviews yet. Before-and-after photos every job. If anything is not right, Ellis comes back and fixes it at no charge. He works by hand with a two-bucket method and never machine polishes a panel without asking first. Summer-seasonal and by appointment, so text to confirm availability.
